title: Wondering if Harvest/Monday Integration is possible

posts.author: RyanPatel95 (Ryan Patel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
not sure where this post belongs so apologies if it is.

I have been tasked with creating a Monday app. The idea is that in a new column called ‘Project Name’ on the board. If the user inputs the project name in this field, it grabs the total hours worked on the project in Harvest, using the Project Name as the ID.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @RyanPatel95

Welcome to the community! There is an existing Harvest <> Monday app, just search for it in the marketplace. From what I see this app does not do what you need. It should be possible to write an app yourself that:

  • authenticates to your Harvest account
  • listen to changes on the monday column
  • get the info from the authenticated Harvest account
